network_summary: Dr. Sawsan Asfour DDS (University of Illinois 1996) is a dentist-owner who opened her first office in Orland Park in 2006 and a second in Worth, IL in 2012 under the brand 'Orland Advanced Dentistry' / 'Orland Advanced Orthodontics'. She also appears as authorized official on two 'Dental Magic' incorporated entities in Chicago (60647) and Niles (60714) — a distinct consumer brand from her Orland Park practice, sharing a single phone number (773-360-1281). Both Dental Magic locations are listed as CLOSED on Yelp as of early 2026. No MSO, management-services agreement, PE sponsor, or DSO platform layer was found for any of the three entities. The pre-existing database affiliated_dso labels ('Dental 360', 'Destiny Dental / ProSmile') appear to be classifier artifacts — no web evidence connects those brand names to these practices.

stale_closed_false_positive_notes: Two of the three locations (Dental Magic North Ave, Chicago 60647 and Dental Magic Touhy, Niles 60714) are listed as CLOSED on Yelp as of February/March 2026. These should be treated as stale/closed shells for denominator purposes. The Orland Park location (Asfour Dental Inc) appears active. The database pre-labels of 'Dental 360' and 'Destiny Dental/ProSmile' as affiliated_dso are likely classifier false positives — no web evidence supports those brand associations.
evidence_chain: AO signal: SAWSAN ASFOUR listed as authorized official on 3 distinct NPI org records across ZIPs 60467, 60647, 60714. Documentary corroboration: (1) orlandortho.com confirms Dr. Sawsan Asfour DDS as founder/owner at 11315 W 143rd St Orland Park, opened 2006 — matching Asfour Dental Inc NPPES address exactly. (2) Web directories (Yelp, PatientConnect365) confirm 'Dental Magic' is a consumer-facing brand at both the Chicago (2500 W North Ave) and Niles (5622 W Touhy Ave) addresses, sharing phone 773-360-1281 — a single-owner multi-location signal. (3) Both Dental Magic locations confirmed CLOSED on Yelp (updated 2026). (4) No MSO, management company, PE sponsor, or DSO platform layer found across three searches. The structure is a dentist-founded private multi-location group — dentist_multi, dentist-owned, no PE/DSO.
future_app_notes: 1. DENTAL MAGIC NORTH AVE (60647) and DENTAL MAGIC TOUHY (60714): both appear CLOSED per Yelp 2026 — recommend flagging entity_classification for review as stale/closed and excluding from active GP denominator. 2. The pre-existing affiliated_dso labels ('Dental 360' on 826ff5b11537f2cb, 'Destiny Dental/ProSmile' on 53da362f58dc8d20) should be investigated for false-positive promotion — no web evidence found linking these Dental Magic practices to those DSO brands. 3. ASFOUR DENTAL INC (60467) appears active and independently owned — no change needed to current small_group classification. 4. If this network's two closed Dental Magic locations were previously promoted to dso_regional based on those affiliated_dso labels, they may be candidates for demotion.
